title: Secret BOP Doors
description: Minecraft addon for Biomes O'Plenty and Secret Doors for BOP-specific secret doors (and trapdoors)
body:
Addon for [Biomes O'Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and [Super Secret Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-secret-doors) that adds in BOP-specific secret doors!

Includes doors and trapdoors for
- all wood types, including planks, logs (in both orientations), and stripped logs (ditto)
- sandstone types
- mud bricks (1.18.2)
